compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect onboarding and architect-foundation refinements
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and other existing documentation to reflect the refined onboarding and architect-foundation skills.
**Why**: After the epic completes, CLAUDE.md's quick reference table, architecture section, and any references to onboarding or architect-foundation behavior need to reflect the new capabilities (auto-detection, infrastructure init, recommendation engine, artifact review).
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md quick reference and architecture sections; update any existing docs that reference onboarding or architect-foundation behavior
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the refined onboarding and architect-foundation capabilities
  ← Satisfies: "End-to-end acceptance"

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting and conventions
- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
